Senior Full-Stack Engineer
Acme Financial Technologies — London, UK (Hybrid)

About Us
Acme Financial Technologies is a fast-growing fintech startup building the next generation of payment infrastructure for European businesses. We process over 2 billion transactions per year and are expanding into real-time settlement.

The Role
We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join our Platform team. You will own end-to-end feature delivery across our React front-end and Node.js microservices, working closely with product and design to ship delightful experiences for our merchant dashboard.

Responsibilities
- Design and implement new features across the full stack (React, Node.js, PostgreSQL)
- Build and maintain RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints
- Collaborate with DevOps to improve CI/CD pipelines and AWS infrastructure
- Mentor junior engineers through code reviews and pair programming
- Contribute to architectural decisions and technical roadmaps
- Monitor production systems and respond to incidents

Requirements
- 3+ years of professional experience in full-stack web development
- Strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, and Node.js
- Experience with PostgreSQL or similar relational databases
- Familiarity with AWS services (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS)
- Solid understanding of RESTful API design and microservice architecture
- Experience with Git, CI/CD, and agile development practices

Nice to Have
- Experience in fintech or payments domain
- Knowledge of GraphQL and Apollo
- Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes
- Contributions to open-source projects

Salary: GBP 75,000 - 95,000 + equity
Remote Policy: Hybrid (3 days in office)
